creator: Martin.Birgmeier@aon.at
text:
A reinstallation of firefox (for example, using portupgrade) removes
the installation of firefox-sync. This happens with every version of
the two I have tried so far (firefox, firefox35, etc.).

As another matter, firefox-sync should be split into separate ports in
order to support different versions of the browser. The current way of
using an OPTION is ugly.

How-To-Repeat: Reinstall firefox and observe that firefox-sync is gone.
